name: @aiplottwist/api
description: FastAPI backend for AI Plot Twist. Python sources live under app/. This package.json exists only so pnpm workspaces can route 'pnpm --filter ./apps/api <script>' calls into uv-based commands; it has no Node runtime deps.

scripts.check: echo 'TODO (T-005..T-013): uv run ruff check . && uv run mypy --strict app/'
scripts.migrate: echo 'TODO (T-009): uv run alembic upgrade head'
